name: Terminological contradiction detection
prompt: Audit consistency across 4 units of Ciencias Naturales 5to grado. Unit 2 defines 'ecosistema' as 'conjunto de seres vivos y su entorno fisico que interactuan entre si.' Unit 5 defines 'ecosistema' as 'sistema biologico cerrado que se autorregula.' These definitions are incompatible. Also, Unit 3 uses the term 'fotosintesis' in an activity, but the term is first defined in Unit 4. Produce the consistency audit report.
expected_behavior: Flags 'ecosistema' contradiction as CRITICAL with both definitions and locations
Recommends unifying to one definition and updating the other unit
Flags 'fotosintesis' forward reference as CRITICAL: used in U3 before defined in U4
Recommends either moving the definition to U3 or removing the U3 reference
Produces properly formatted terminology contradiction and sequential logic tables

name: Progressive complexity regression detection
prompt: Audit the complexity progression for DZ-CCNN-5-03 across 4 units. Unit 1 has activities at Aplicar level. Unit 2 drops to Comprender level. Unit 3 jumps to Evaluar level. Unit 4 returns to Analizar level. Produce the progression curve analysis.
expected_behavior: Detects regression from Aplicar (U1) to Comprender (U2) — WARNING
Detects regression from Evaluar (U3) to Analizar (U4) — WARNING
Maps the full progression curve: Aplicar -> Comprender -> Evaluar -> Analizar
Notes the curve is non-monotonic with 2 regressions
Recommends restructuring: Comprender -> Aplicar -> Analizar -> Evaluar for proper scaffolding

name: Cross-reference integrity with broken links
prompt: Audit cross-references in a 5-unit textbook. Unit 4 Block 2 says 'como vimos en la Unidad 2, los ecosistemas acuaticos...' but Unit 2 only covers ecosistemas terrestres, not acuaticos. Unit 5 says 'recuerda la actividad de clasificacion de la Unidad 3' but Unit 3 has no classification activity. Produce the cross-reference integrity report.
expected_behavior: Flags U4-B2 cross-reference as CRITICAL: claims U2 covers 'ecosistemas acuaticos' but U2 covers terrestres
Flags U5 cross-reference as CRITICAL: references a classification activity that does not exist in U3
Classifies both as broken cross-references that mislead students
Recommends correcting U4 reference to match U2 content or adding aquatic ecosystem content to U2
Recommends removing U5 reference or adding classification activity to U3
